description: Sanitized Kaizen #200 replay: ANSI passing tests and category-list prose must not create false blockers.

input.task: Require an authorized label before externally operated issues can run.
input.diff:

+The verifier covers auth, secrets, billing, and database migrations.
diff --git a/src/config.ts b/src/config.ts

diff --git a/src/github/client.ts b/src/github/client.ts
+const authorized = permissionRank(permission) >= permissionRank(minimumPermission)
+return { authorized, actor, permission }
